targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "VMs" FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest WHERE 1=1
AND ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Powered On" FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest WHERE power_state = 'poweredOn'
AND ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))

SELECT m.collection_timestamp AS time, c.name AS metric, m.cpu_usage_avg_mhz AS "CPU (MHz)"
FROM vmware_vm_metrics m
JOIN raw_vmware_vm_config c ON m.vcenter_uuid = c.vcenter_uuid AND m.vm_moid = c.vm_moid AND m.collection_timestamp = c.collection_timestamp
WHERE m.collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$vm' = '' OR c.name IN ($vm))
ORDER BY time

SELECT m.collection_timestamp AS time, c.name AS metric, m.mem_usage_avg_percent AS "Memory %"
FROM vmware_vm_metrics m
JOIN raw_vmware_vm_config c ON m.vcenter_uuid = c.vcenter_uuid AND m.vm_moid = c.vm_moid AND m.collection_timestamp = c.collection_timestamp
WHERE m.collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$vm' = '' OR c.name IN ($vm))
ORDER BY time

SELECT m.collection_timestamp AS time, c.name AS metric, m.cpu_ready_avg_ms AS "CPU ready (ms)"
FROM vmware_vm_metrics m
JOIN raw_vmware_vm_config c ON m.vcenter_uuid = c.vcenter_uuid AND m.vm_moid = c.vm_moid AND m.collection_timestamp = c.collection_timestamp
WHERE m.collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$vm' = '' OR c.name IN ($vm))
ORDER BY time

SELECT vm_name AS vm_name, COALESCE(mem_usage_avg_percent, 0) AS "Memory %"
FROM mv_vmware_vm_metrics_latest
WHERE ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))
ORDER BY "Memory %" DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

SELECT vm_name AS "VM", cluster_name AS "Cluster", host_name AS "Host",
  cpu_usage_avg_mhz AS "CPU (MHz)", mem_usage_avg_percent AS "Mem %", disk_usage_avg_kbps AS "Disk (KBps)", net_usage_avg_kbps AS "Net (KBps)"
FROM mv_vmware_vm_metrics_latest
WHERE ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))
ORDER BY cpu_usage_avg_mhz DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

SELECT vcenter_name AS "vCenter", datacenter_name AS "Datacenter", cluster_name AS "Cluster", host_name AS "Host",
  vm_name AS "VM", power_state AS "Power", num_cpu AS "vCPU", memory_size_mb AS "Mem (MB)",
  current_cpu_mhz AS "CPU (MHz)", current_guest_memory_mb AS "Guest Mem (MB)"
FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest
WHERE ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))
ORDER BY vcenter_name, datacenter_name, cluster_name, host_name, vm_name

panels.title: VM list - power state and capacity

list.label: vCenter
list.name: vcenter
list.query: SELECT name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter ORDER BY name

list.label: Datacenter
list.name: datacenter
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT dc.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON dc.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
WHERE '$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Location
list.name: location
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Cluster
list.name: cluster
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT cl.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$location' = '' OR SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) IN ($location))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Host
list.name: host
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT h.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_host h
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON h.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl ON h.vcenter_uuid::text = cl.vcenter_uuid::text AND h.parent_component_moid = cl.component_moid
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR cl.name IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: VM
list.name: vm
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT inv.vm_name FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest inv
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR inv.vcenter_name IN ($vcenter))
AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR inv.datacenter_name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR inv.cluster_name IN ($cluster))
AND ('$host' = '' OR inv.host_name IN ($host))
ORDER BY 1
